title: cornus chinensis f. microcarpa
intro: Cornus chinensis f. microcarpa, also known as the small-fruited Chinese dogwood, is a plant species that belongs to the dogwood family (Cornaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation, which are attributed to its flavonoid and alkaloid compounds. The health benefits of Cornus chinensis f. microcarpa include improved cardiovascular health, reduced risk of certain cancers, and enhanced immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues.
